title: pseudanthus orbicularis
intro: Pseudanthus orbicularis, also known as the Round-leaved Pseudanthus or Round-leaf, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is native to Australia and is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Pseudanthus orbicularis can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits and is often used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and viral infections.
